system.name: Prasna Shastra - Horary Astrology
system.description: Answer specific questions using chart cast for moment question is asked
system.uniqueness: DOES NOT REQUIRE BIRTH TIME - uses question time
system.purpose: Get immediate answers to specific pressing questions
system.importance: Solves problem when birth time unknown or for urgent specific queries
system.principle: Universe arranges that question is asked at cosmically significant moment revealing answer
system.scope: Lost objects, yes/no questions, timing, outcomes, hidden information, specific life queries
system.vedicReferences: Prasna Marga, Prasna Tantra, Krishneeya, Prasna Shastra classical texts
system.modernRelevance: Instant answers without birth chart; practical guidance; emergency situations

howPrasnaWorks.name: Mechanism of Prasna
howPrasnaWorks.principle: Questioner's consciousness aligns with cosmic moment to ask at revealing time

process.description: Questioner formulates clear, specific question in mind
process.requirement: Question must be genuine, pressing, specific - not casual curiosity
process.clarity: Vague questions give vague answers; specific questions give precise answers

process.description: Moment question is spoken/written to astrologer
process.timing: THIS moment's chart is cast - not when thought, but when communicated

process.description: Horary chart created for exact time and place question received
process.data: Date, time (precise to minute), location of astrologer

process.focus: Lagna, Moon, relevant house lords, planetary positions

process.description: Answer revealed through planetary positions and combinations
process.confidence: Chart shows whether answer is clear or situation still evolving

validity: Questioner must be sincere - not testing astrologer
Question should be specific, not multiple vague queries
Repeated asking of same question invalid - first chart remains valid
Astrologer must analyze immediately or soon - chart loses potency if delayed
Emergency questions more potent than casual queries
limitations: Not for past events (use birth chart)
Not for general life overview (use birth chart)
Not for multiple unrelated questions in one chart
Cannot override free will - shows current trajectory

analysis: Lagna sign shows questioner's state of mind
Lagna lord strength shows questioner's capacity to achieve desired outcome
Lagna lord placement shows where questioner's energy is focused
Benefics in lagna = favorable for questioner
Malefics in lagna = struggles, obstacles
Planets aspecting lagna influence questioner's situation
keyFactors.strength: Strong lagna lord = questioner has power to influence outcome positively

keyFactors.importance: VERY HIGH - represents questioner's mind and question itself
analysis: Moon's sign shows emotional state of questioner
Moon's nakshatra crucial for detailed timing and nature
Moon's strength (exalted, debilitated, aspects) shows clarity of situation
Moon applying aspect to planet shows outcome direction
Moon separating from planet shows what is past
Waxing Moon generally favorable; waning can show decline
Moon in kendras (1,4,7,10) = strong question, clear answer
Moon in dusthanas (6,8,12) = difficult situation, unclear answer
keyFactors.critical: Moon is MOST important planet in Prasna - analyze thoroughly

houses.6th: Disease, enemies, litigation, service, obstacles, theft
houses.7th: Marriage, partnerships, spouse, legal contracts, missing person location
houses.8th: Death, hidden matters, sudden events, inheritance, chronic issues
houses.9th: Father, fortune, long travel, higher education, religion, law
houses.11th: Gains, income, fulfillment of desires, elder siblings
houses.12th: Losses, expenses, foreign, hospitals, spirituality, imprisonment

keyFactors.analysis: Check lord of relevant house, planets in house, aspects to house

analysis: Its strength shows outcome potential
Its placement shows where outcome will come from
Its aspects show influences on outcome
If connected to lagna/lagna lord = favorable
If in dusthana = difficulties
If retrograde = delays, unconventional resolution

keyFactors.importance: Connections between lagna lord and house lord
keyFactors.favorable: Lagna lord and question house lord in mutual aspect/conjunction = SUCCESS likely
keyFactors.unfavorable: No connection between lagna lord and house lord = difficult to achieve
keyFactors.timing: Aspect forming soon = event soon; separating = past/declining

keyFactors.principle: Benefics on relevant houses/lords = favorable; malefics = obstacles

specialConsiderations.effect: Too close to Sun - hidden, ego-involved, may not manifest clearly
specialConsiderations.interpretation: Outcome may be obscured or delayed

specialConsiderations.effect: Going backward - delays, unconventional means, revisiting past
specialConsiderations.interpretation: Expect delays; outcome through unexpected means; past connection

specialConsiderations.effect: Very strong - excellent for their significations
specialConsiderations.interpretation: Matters of that planet very favorable

specialConsiderations.effect: Very weak - struggles for their significations
specialConsiderations.interpretation: Difficulties in matters of that planet

yesNoQuestions.name: Answering Yes/No Questions in Prasna
yesNoQuestions.method: Simple yes/no queries answered through chart strength
yesIndicators: Lagna lord in kendra (1,4,7,10) or trikona (5,9) = Strong YES
Lagna lord exalted or in own sign = YES
Benefics (Jupiter, Venus, Mercury) in lagna or aspecting lagna = YES
Question house lord strong and well-placed = YES
Moon waxing, strong, in kendra/trikona = YES
Lagna lord and relevant house lord in mutual aspect = YES
Jupiter or Venus in 11th house (fulfillment) = YES
Strong connection between lagna and relevant house = YES
noIndicators: Lagna lord in dusthana (6,8,12) = Likely NO
Lagna lord debilitated, combust, or severely afflicted = NO
Malefics (Saturn, Mars, Rahu, Ketu) in lagna without benefic aspect = NO
Question house lord weak or afflicted = NO
Moon waning, weak, in dusthana = NO
No connection between lagna lord and house lord = NO
Saturn or Rahu in 11th house (denial of gains) = NO
Severe malefic aspects on lagna and relevant house = NO
maybeIndicators: Mixed signals - some yes factors, some no factors = MAYBE/CONDITIONAL
Retrograde planets involved = Delayed, unconventional outcome
Lagna lord/house lord in 3rd or 11th (upachaya) = Grows with effort
Benefic and malefic both influencing = Partial success

examples.question: Will I get the job?
examples.chart: Lagna Leo, Lagna lord Sun in 10th Taurus exalted, 10th lord Venus in lagna, Moon in Sagittarius (trikona), Jupiter aspect lagna
examples.analysis: Lagna lord (Sun) in 10th exalted = STRONG career focus; 10th lord (Venus) in lagna = job coming to questioner; Moon in trikona = favorable; Jupiter aspect = blessing
examples.answer: STRONG YES - likely to get job soon

examples.question: Will I get the job?
examples.chart: Lagna Scorpio, Lagna lord Mars in 8th debilitated, 10th lord Sun combust in 12th, Moon in 6th waning, Saturn aspects lagna
examples.analysis: Lagna lord debilitated in 8th = weak position; 10th lord combust in 12th = hidden/lost opportunity; Moon in 6th = obstacles; Saturn aspect = delays
examples.answer: LIKELY NO - many obstacles, or not right job for questioner

specificQuestions.name: Specific Question Types with Analysis Methods

method: Determine object type and its planetary ruler
Lagna indicates starting point (where questioner is)
Direction: Moon's sign indicates direction from questioner

location.Moon_in_8th: Hidden, dark place, may not recover
location.Moon_in_12th: Lost, far away, difficult to recover

recovery: 2nd lord strong and connected to lagna = WILL RECOVER
2nd lord in dusthana (6,8,12) = Difficult to recover or damaged
Benefic aspect on 2nd house = Recovery possible
Malefic aspect on 2nd house = May not recover
Moon applying aspect to 2nd lord = Will find soon
categories.timing: Moon's nakshatra and degrees indicate number of days/hours

method: Lagna lord - 7th lord connection = marriage happens
Jupiter aspect on 7th (for women) or Venus aspect (for men) favorable
yesMarriage: 7th lord and lagna lord in mutual aspect
Moon waxing and in favorable house
noMarriage: No connection between lagna lord and 7th lord
categories.timing: Check dasha/transits from birth chart; prasna shows if proposal under consideration succeeds

method: 10th house and lord for career matters
Lagna lord - 10th lord connection = job success
categories.promotion: 11th lord - 10th lord connection; Jupiter transit favorable

method: Lagna and lagna lord for overall health
recovery: Lagna lord strong = Good vitality, recovery likely
Benefics in lagna = Healing forces strong
6th lord in dusthana = Disease leaving body
Jupiter aspect on lagna = Protection and healing
danger: Malefics in lagna without benefic aspect = Difficult recovery
Moon waning and afflicted = Mental/emotional decline
categories.timing: Moon's position indicates crisis days; benefic transits indicate recovery periods

method: Compare strength: lagna lord vs 7th lord
willWin: Lagna lord stronger than 7th lord = QUESTIONER WINS
Benefics in lagna, malefics in 7th = Questioner favored
Jupiter aspect on lagna = Justice favors questioner
Moon in kendra and waxing = Victory
willLose: 7th lord stronger than lagna lord = OPPONENT WINS
Malefics in lagna, benefics in 7th = Opponent favored
11th lord weak or afflicted = Desires unfulfilled
Lagna lord in 6th/12th = Questioner faces losses
Saturn aspects lagna heavily = Delays, losses
categories.settlement: Benefics in both lagna and 7th = Mutual settlement possible

method: Check lords and planets in these houses
safeTravel: Benefics in travel house or aspecting
No malefic aspects on lagna and travel house
Jupiter aspect on travel house = Protection
unsafe: Malefics in travel house, especially Mars (accidents), Rahu (unexpected)
categories.timing: Moon's nakshatra indicates auspicious travel days

method: Check 8th house for danger to person
12th house shows if person far away
alive: Moon in kendra/trikona = Will be found
7th lord in visible houses (1,4,7,10) = Found soon
danger: 7th lord combust = Hidden, difficult to find
categories.location: 7th lord's sign and house shows direction and type of place

method: 6th house for secret enemies and thieves
Check who is stronger - questioner (lagna) or enemy (6th/7th)
catchThief: Lagna lord stronger than 6th lord = Thief caught
Jupiter aspect on lagna = Justice served
categories.thiefDescription: 6th lord's planet describes thief (Mars=aggressive, Mercury=clever, Saturn=old/poor)
categories.recoveryOfGoods: 2nd lord strong and connected to lagna = Goods recovered

success: 10th lord and 11th lord strong and connected = SUCCESS
failure: Saturn heavily afflicting business houses = Delays, losses

pregnant: 5th lord and lagna lord connected = Conception possible
notPregnant: Jupiter weak or afflicted = Children karaka weak
Ketu in 5th = Denial of children or spiritual direction
categories.gender: If pregnant, check 5th house: masculine planets/signs = boy; feminine = girl

method: 11th house for fulfillment of desire to pass
pass: Jupiter aspect on 5th = Grace and luck
11th lord strong = Desire fulfilled, will pass

methods.principle: Number of nakshatras Moon must traverse indicates time units
methods.calculation: Count nakshatras from Moon to relevant planet/house lord
methods.units: Can be days, weeks, or months depending on question
methods.example: If Moon in Rohini and meeting planet lord in Uttara Phalguni = 4 nakshatras = 4 days/weeks/months

methods.principle: Angular (1,4,7,10) = Fast; Succedent (2,5,8,11) = Medium; Cadent (3,6,9,12) = Slow

methods.slow: Jupiter = Slow (months); Saturn = Very slow (months to years)

methods.applying: Planets moving toward aspect = Event approaching
methods.exact: Exact aspect = Event at peak or imminent

examples.question: When will I get job?
examples.chart: Moon at 10° Taurus, 10th lord at 25° Taurus (same sign, applying aspect)
examples.calculation: 15 degrees apart, both fast planets, same sign

examples.question: When will I get job?
examples.chart: Moon in Gemini, 10th lord Saturn in Aquarius (9 signs away)
examples.calculation: Very far, Saturn slow, no immediate connection
examples.timing: Many months, not soon - may need to wait or try different opportunity

yogas.description: Lagna lord and Moon in mutual kendras (1,4,7,10)
yogas.effect: VERY AUSPICIOUS - desire fulfillment almost certain

yogas.description: Lagna lord and relevant house lord in mutual aspect or conjunction
Malefics in kendras without benefic relief
yogas.effect: Severe obstacles, suffering related to question
Ups and downs, instability in outcome

yogas.description: 7th lord - lagna lord mutual aspect + Venus strong
11th lord in kendra from lagna or Moon
2nd lord in kendra and aspected by benefics

planetarySignificationsInPrasna.name: What Each Planet Represents in Horary

planets.represents: Authority, government, father, ego, leadership, health, vitality, clarity
Mind, emotions, mother, public, water, fluids, travel, changes, QUESTIONER'S MIND
Energy, courage, property, siblings, surgery, accidents, aggression, fire, police
Intelligence, communication, business, education, speech, trade, friends, documents
Wisdom, knowledge, children, husband, guru, fortune, expansion, ethics, law
planets.inquirer: When strong - wise, ethical person; Jupiter aspect = blessings

planets.represents: Love, marriage, wife, luxury, arts, beauty, comfort, vehicles, pleasure
Delays, obstacles, hard work, servants, labor, old things, discipline, longevity
planets.inquirer: When strong - patient, hardworking; when afflicting - delays

planets.represents: Sudden events, foreign, unconventional, illusion, obsession, poison, electricity
Spirituality, detachment, past life, sudden, mysticism, isolation, loss
planets.inquirer: When strong - detached, spiritual; when afflicting - losses

examples.question: Will I recover my stolen laptop?
examples.context: Laptop stolen from office 3 days ago, questioner asks on day 4

chartData.lagnaLord: Mercury in 2nd house Libra (own house - valuables)
chartData.moon: Moon in Cancer 11th house (exalted, fulfillment house)
chartData.2ndLord: Venus in 2nd house Libra (own sign, strong)
chartData.6thHouse: Aquarius with Rahu (theft house, thief indicated)

analysis.lagnaLord: Mercury in 2nd house = Questioner's focus on valuables, strong connection
analysis.2ndLord: Venus strong in own sign = Valuables can be recovered
analysis.moonStrength: Moon exalted in 11th = Desire will be fulfilled
analysis.thiefIndication: Rahu in 6th = Sudden theft by unconventional means
analysis.mercuryVenusTogether: Both in 2nd = Object and questioner connected

reasoning: 2nd lord Venus very strong (own sign, 2nd house)
Lagna lord Mercury in 2nd = Direct connection to valuables
Moon exalted in 11th = Fulfillment of desire to recover
examples.timing: Moon in Cancer 11th, Mercury-Venus in Libra 2nd = ~4-7 days (fast planets, positive aspects)
examples.location: Cancer Moon = North direction; 11th house = Among friends/network area
examples.howRecovered: Mercury-Venus in 2nd = Through official channels (Mercury) with help (Venus), likely office security/police
examples.actualOutcome: Laptop found after 6 days in office storage room (network area, office = 11th house relevance)

examples.question: Should I invest in this business partnership?
examples.context: Questioner considering partnership investment, uncertain about partner's reliability

chartData.lagnaLord: Mars in 5th house Pisces (debilitated, speculation house)
chartData.11thHouse: Virgo (gains) no planets, lord Mercury in 12th

analysis.lagnaLord: Mars debilitated in 5th = Weak position for questioner, speculation risky
analysis.moonWeak: Moon debilitated = Mind unclear, emotional confusion about decision
analysis.7thLordIn12th: Partner (Venus) in 12th = Losses through partnership, partner unreliable
analysis.rahuIn7th: Sudden events in partnership, deception possible, illusion
analysis.10thLordCombust: Business (Sun) combust in 12th = Hidden issues, ego involved, losses
analysis.saturnIn2nd: Wealth house afflicted = Capital at risk
analysis.11thLordIn12th: Gains lord Mercury in 12th = Profits turn to losses

reasoning: 7th lord in 12th = Partnership leads to losses
Rahu in 7th = Partner may deceive, illusions about partnership
Both lagna lord and Moon debilitated = Weak judgment, unclear mind
10th lord combust in 12th = Business has hidden fatal flaws
11th lord in 12th = Expected gains become losses
ALL major factors negative - extremely unfavorable
warnings: Partner may have hidden agenda (Rahu in 7th)
Business may have undisclosed problems (Sun combust 12th)
Capital loss highly likely (Saturn in 2nd, 11th lord in 12th)
examples.advice: Do NOT invest. Chart shows deception, losses, hidden problems. Trust this warning.
examples.actualOutcome: Questioner ignored advice and invested. Partner disappeared with money after 3 months. Classic Rahu in 7th + Venus in 12th manifestation.

examples.question: Will my mother's surgery be successful?
examples.context: Mother scheduled for surgery in 2 days, questioner worried about outcome

chartData.4thLord: Sun in 4th house Leo (own sign, strong)
chartData.aspects: Jupiter aspects 4th house (mother), Venus, and Moon

analysis.mother: 4th house and lord Sun represent mother
analysis.4thLordStrong: Sun in own sign Leo in 4th = Mother strong, vitality good
analysis.jupiterIn8th: Jupiter in 8th own sign = PROTECTION during surgery (8th=surgery, Jupiter=protection)
analysis.jupiterAspects: Jupiter aspects mother's house (4th), questioner (Venus), family (Moon) = Blessing all
analysis.venusExalted: Questioner (Venus) exalted in 11th = Desire fulfilled, positive outcome
analysis.saturnRetro6th: Disease (6th) with Saturn retrograde = Disease going away, leaving body
analysis.moonIn2nd: Family concern, but Moon not afflicted

examples.answer: YES - Surgery will be successful, mother will recover well
reasoning: 4th lord Sun very strong (own sign, 4th house) = Mother has vitality
Jupiter in 8th own sign = EXCELLENT for surgery - protection during dangerous process
Jupiter aspects 4th house = Direct blessing on mother
Venus exalted in 11th = Questioner's desire (recovery) fulfilled
Saturn retrograde in 6th = Disease being removed/reversed
All major factors positive for successful outcome
examples.timing: Surgery in 2 days as planned = Good timing (Jupiter protecting)
examples.recovery: Sun strong + Jupiter aspect = Strong recovery, vitality returns quickly
examples.advice: Proceed with surgery confidently. Do Mahamrityunjaya mantra for added protection.
examples.actualOutcome: Surgery successful, mother recovered well, faster than doctors expected. Jupiter in 8th protection manifested perfectly.

modernApplications.name: Using Prasna in Modern Context

applications.solution: Use Prasna instead of birth chart
applications.benefit: Can still provide astrological guidance without birth data

applications.solution: Prasna gives immediate answer without waiting for favorable periods
Ask Prasna for each option separately
applications.benefit: Compare chart strengths to choose best option

applications.solution: Use Prasna to verify birth chart predictions
Ask specific question about specific event
applications.benefit: More precise than general birth chart for specific events

applications.solution: Quick Prasna for important daily decisions
applications.benefit: Practical guidance for routine but important choices

online: Email/text question = Chart for time question received by astrologer
Chat/call = Chart for time question explicitly asked
Location = Where astrologer is when receiving question
Time zone = Astrologer's location time zone
ethics: Do not repeatedly ask same question (first chart remains valid)
Be sincere - testing astrologer gives false charts
Specific questions only - not vague general queries
Accept answer even if not what you wanted to hear
Chart shows current trajectory - free will can still change outcome with effort

limitations.name: What Prasna Cannot Do
cannotDo: Replace complete birth chart for overall life analysis
Provide detailed personality analysis (use birth chart)
Predict multiple life areas simultaneously (one question at a time)
Override karmic patterns (shows current trajectory only)
Work if question insincere or testing astrologer
Provide complete life timeline (use birth chart with dasha)
Give general life guidance (too specific for that)
notRecommended: Multiple unrelated questions (one chart = one question)
Repeated asking same question (first chart valid)

note: Prasna is powerful tool when used correctly. Requires sincere question, skilled analysis, and acceptance of answer. Most useful when birth chart unavailable or for urgent specific queries. Should complement, not replace, birth chart analysis for major life decisions.
